body:
## Summary
- Rewrite q115’s 1860 religious-freedom English distractor and explanation to natural phrasing while preserving the Swedish source meaning, correct answer, UHR ch12 page 42 metadata, and 1860/1951 distinction.
- Generate the canonical CSV/static question bank updates for q115 and derived variants q636/q638/q639.
- Add q115-specific derived-content and published-bank guards so the old `choose any religion or no religion at all completely freely` phrasing fails validation in the 1860 religious-freedom cluster.

## Validation
- `node scripts/export-question-bank.js --check`
- `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test-name-pattern "religious-freedom 1860" --test tests/content-published-question-types.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test-name-pattern "q115 religious-freedom 1860" --test scripts/derived-content.test.js`
- `node --test tests/content-question-sentence-endings.test.js tests/content-static-site-question-bank-parity.test.js`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run format:check`
- `npm run build:web:export`
- `git diff --check`

Note: `node scripts/export-site-question-bank.js --check` reports format-only drift because the exporter’s current generated formatting differs from the committed static file shape, but semantic parity passes with no changed question or chapter ids.
title: fix: naturalize q115 religious freedom English
